name_en: (With full packaging)!!️【New】Ophidia Series Mini Shoulder Bag. This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, oatmeal cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (15.5cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (height adjustable from 51.5cm to 58.5cm) Zipper closure, Weight: approx. 0.35kg.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️【New】Ophidia Series Mini Shoulder Bag. This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, oatmeal cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (15.5cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (height adjustable from 51.5cm to 58.5cm) Zipper closure, Weight: approx. 0.35kg.
Model: 795208
Dimensions: 18.5(W) x 10(H) x 10cm(D)
Color: Oatmeal/pvc
Max capacity: iPhone Plus, card holder, Airpods earbuds and lipstick
